diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -10,6 +10,28 @@
             nn.ReLU(),

             nn.Dropout(dropout),

             nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(dropout),

+            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 1),

+        )

+    def forward(self, x):

+        return self.net(x).squeeze(-1)

+

+class LegacyMLP(nn.Module):

+    """3-hidden-layer MLP with BatchNorm, used for older best_512.pt checkpoints."""

+    def __init__(self, input_dim, hidden_dim, dropout=0.3):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.net = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Linear(input_dim, hidden_dim),

+            nn.BatchNorm1d(hidden_dim),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(dropout),

+            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),

+            nn.BatchNorm1d(hidden_dim),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(dropout),

+            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),

+            nn.BatchNorm1d(hidden_dim),

             nn.ReLU(),

             nn.Dropout(dropout),

             nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 1),

--- a/predict.py

 from qlib.data.dataset.handler import DataHandlerLP

@@ -77,13 +78,33 @@
         with open(config_path, "r") as f:

             cfg = json.load(f)

 

-        model_cls = ResMLP if cfg.get("model_type") == "ResMLP" else MLP

-        sig = inspect.signature(model_cls.__init__)

+        if cfg.get("model_type") == "ResMLP":

+            candidate_classes = [ResMLP]

+        else:

+            candidate_classes = [MLP, LegacyMLP]

+

+        sig = inspect.signature(candidate_classes[0].__init__)

         valid_keys = set(sig.parameters.keys()) - {"self"}

-        model_kwargs = {k:v for k,v in cfg.items() if k in valid_keys}

-        model = model_cls(**model_kwargs).to(device)

-        model.load_state_dict(torch.load(ckpt_path, map_location="cpu"))

+        model_kwargs = {k: v for k, v in cfg.items() if k in valid_keys}

+

+        model = None

+        load_err = None

+        for cls in candidate_classes:

+            try:

+                model = cls(**model_kwargs).to(device)

+                state = torch.load(ckpt_path, map_location="cpu")

+                model.load_state_dict(state)

+                break

+            except RuntimeError as e:

+                load_err = e

+                continue

+

+        if model is None:

+            print(f"Warning: skipping {info['ckpt']}: {load_err}")

+            continue

+

         model.eval()

+        loaded_count += 1

 

         X_t = torch.tensor(X_test_scaled, dtype=torch.float32).to(device)

         batch_size = 4096

             weighted_preds += w * preds

         total_weight += w

+

     preds = weighted_preds / total_weight if total_weight > 0 else weighted_preds
